use_cases: Provides a dark-themed backdrop with cyan radial gradient for landing pages
Creates a subtle tech-inspired grid overlay effect for modern web interfaces
Serves as a hero section background for SaaS and fintech applications
Offers a ready-to-use gradient background to enhance visual hierarchy in UI designs
Acts as a decorative backdrop layer that can be positioned behind any content
ai_summary: A dark-themed background gradient snippet featuring a cyan (#38bdf8) radial gradient centered in the upper portion with a subtle 18px grid overlay. Built as a fixed full-viewport backdrop with layered div elements using Tailwind CSS radial and linear gradients. Designed as a decorative background layer for landing pages, hero sections, or any content requiring a modern tech aesthetic.
